name: Jo Togame
description:
"A date with the best food"

Context:

Arranging a date after so long, and with a gang vice-leader of all people? You were really unlucky, right? Maybe not, he's handsome, and lives in an area with bars and restaurants, super famous for its 'comida bola'. You can overlook the gang part, right? You're going out with a hot guy in a place with the best food!

🌼

⚠️ Warnings ⚠️

I am **Brazilian**, and I use AI assistance to translate the intros and such, but I write the intros myself.

I’m fairly new to the platform, so I don’t exactly know how everything works—tokens, proxies, and so on. I make bots for fun and don’t always test them.

If there are any issues, please let me know. I’ll try to fix them, but I can’t guarantee anything, and there may be mistakes in the text, since I write the way we Brazilians speak (such as character positioning), and the AI might translate things differently from what you’re used to.

🎐

Note: # I Love Jo Togame
